(H3A) Any Scheduled Toileting Plan CHAR 1 Continence in last 14 days: appliances and programs - any scheduled toileting plan. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
268 H3B H3B_BLADDER_TR (H3B) Bladder Retraining Program CHAR 1 Continence in last 14 days: appliances and programs - bladder retraining program. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
269 H3C H3C_EXTERN_CATH (H3C) External Condom Catheter CHAR 1 Continence in last 14 days: appliances and programs - external (condom) catheter. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-"
